examples: Would like to return to the days when Americans believed: 'By golly, you don't futz around with Uncle Sam' (Wall Street Journal).
If you need to track the time for other reasons, use whatever you used before you knew about Scrum, but don't futz with the Scrum framework to do it.
To fix something you have to take your hands off the keyboard and wedge your fat finger between the offending characters and then futz with the selection boxes.
